summary.perturbation_scope: Model-forward MPS accuracy rows with KEEP/DEGRADE/PRUNE tiered column perturbations joined to the architecture PPA tier ratios.

decision.claim: Promoted rows have measured MPS accuracy deltas linked to the same architecture KEEP/DEGRADE/PRUNE ratios and SUDS-aware scheduler traces.

rows.claim_boundary: Accuracy is measured on MPS forward passes with tiered column perturbations. Energy, latency, memory, optical-link, and control terms remain architecture-modeled.
